[[Yuos]] was a broad-shouldered leader of a farming village. He was one of the [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] on [[Anobis]] who decided to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. The farmers' decision caused the offworld dependent miners to plant land [[Mine/Legends|mines]] on his farm's fields, decimating it. In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]] he with the help of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] made peace with [[Elis]]'s mining village.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{1st}}
